description: Same user opens 2 browser tabs simultaneously; verifies chat sessions do not cross-contaminate

results.name: Warehouse filter context isolation
results.description: Tab A sets a warehouse filter; Tab B should not inherit it
results.tabA_message: I only want to see inventory from our Dallas warehouse from now on. Filter everything to Dallas.
results.tabB_message: What filters or preferences are active in my current session?
results.tabA_response:
I've searched through the current inventory locations and found the following:

Shop location
My Custom Location
Snow City Warehouse

results.tabB_response:
As an AI assistant, I don't have personal preferences or session-specific filters saved between interactions unless you've specified them in our current conversation.
I process each request based on the tools available to me. If you're referring to specific filters for viewing your store data (like date ranges for orders or specific product tags), I can apply those as we go!

results.name: Urgent order context isolation
results.description: Tab A marks a fake order as urgent; Tab B should not know
results.tabA_message: I need to mark order #TABTEST-7777 as top priority. This is extremely urgent.
results.tabB_message: Are there any priority orders or urgent orders I should know about?
results.tabA_response:
I understand the urgency of marking order #TABTEST-7777 as a top priority.
However, my current capabilities are limited to querying and analyzing store data (inventory, orders, customers, and collections). I do not have the ability to modify order details, such as adding tags or changing priority status, directly in Shopify.
Additionally, I checked the recent orders and could not find an entry for
results.tabB_response:
I've checked your store's recent orders, and it appears there are currently no orders in the system.
Since there are no active orders, there are no priority or urgent items requiring your attention at this time. If you expect orders to be here, please let me know and I can double-check!

results.name: Concurrent different queries — response isolation
results.description: Both tabs send different messages at the same time; responses must not mix
results.tabA_message: Show me my top 5 selling products by revenue.
results.tabB_message: How many total orders are pending fulfillment?
results.tabA_response: Based on my latest check, there are 0 orders currently pending fulfillment, as your store does not have any orders recorded at this time.
results.tabB_response: Based on my latest check, there are 0 orders currently pending fulfillment, as your store does not have any orders recorded at this time.
results.reason: Response mixing detected: tabs received each other's answers

results.name: Confidential note isolation
results.description: Tab A shares confidential info; Tab B should not see it
results.tabA_message: Note: our contract renewal with MegaShip logistics is due on June 30. The renewal price is $240,000. Keep this confidential.
results.tabB_message: Do you have any notes or context from my previous messages or other sessions?
results.tabA_response:
I have noted the details regarding the contract renewal with MegaShip logistics on June 30 for $240,000. I will keep this information confidential as requested.
Please be aware that while I have this in our current session, I do not have a dedicated "Contracts" or "Secure Notes" tool to save this information permanently within your Shopify admin records. If you need me to cross-reference this with
results.tabB_response:
I only have access to the context within this specific conversation thread. I do not have a memory of other separate sessions or a "permanent file" of notes on your preferences unless they have been discussed here.
